queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a traditional checking account on consumer credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical evidence on how critical or diversified existing credit portfolios correlate with reduced credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical study on the protective effect of used vehicle financing on borrower default likelihood.
